title: Connect
text: Get in touch and follow our work.

title: Connect
text:
Mailing list
We host a mailing list, district magnitude (DM), at Groups.io.

To subscribe, send an empty message to district-magnitude+subscribe@groups.io.
To join the list as a member, contact district-magnitude+owner@groups.io.

title: People
text:
Team
We are pleased to announce that the leadership of the Representation and Electoral Systems Section has transitioned to a new team for 2026–2027. The new leadership team is as follows:

Yuki Atsusaka — Chair
Asya Magazinnik — Council
Paru Shah — Council
Sona Golder — Council
Yann Kerevel — Council
Thiago M. Q. Moreira — Treasurer
Eduardo Alemán — 2026 APSA Division Co-chair
Taeko Hiroi — 2026 APSA Division Co-chair
